mapper.select: select u.*, (select login_ip from user_log where user_type=0 and user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc limit 1) as loginIp, (select create_time from user_log where user_type=0 and user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc limit 1) as loginDate, (select count(order_id) from `order` where user_id = u.user_id) as orderNum, TRUNCATE(u.money/100,2) as formatMoney from `user` as u where u.user_id = #{userId}
